resources.string: Storage is full. Please free up space to continue.
No cached data available. Please check your internet connection.
Cached data is corrupted. Please refresh or clear the cache.
An error occurred while accessing the database. Please try again.
Access to the database is restricted. Please check permissions.
Database is busy. Please try again in a moment.
you hit your rate limit of requests.
Couldn\'t reach server, please check your connection.
the file that you\'re trying to upload is too large.
Oops, something went wrong, please try agin.
